name: Steal or Forge Authentication Certificates - AD CS Abuse
description: Detects AD CS abuse for certificate theft or forgery via Certify, Certipy, ForgeCert, certreq with SAN manipulation, certutil CA backup, and certificate request/issuance events (4886/4887).
query: process where event.type == "start" and (process.args : ("*Certify*", "*Certipy*", "*ForgeCert*", "*PassTheCert*") or (process.name == "certreq.exe" and process.args : "*SAN:*") or (process.name == "certutil.exe" and process.args : ("-backup", "-exportPFX", "-ca.cert")))
note: Complement with: event.code: ("4886" or "4887") for certificate request/issuance monitoring. Alert when certificate SAN does not match the requesting user.
